body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: New Participant Program: Welcome and Introduction
New Participant Program: Internet-Drafts and RFCs
New Participant Program: Participating in the IETF
New Participant Program: Participant Panel and Hot Topics
New Participant Program: Introduction to the Hackathon
